seo.title: Auto Parts Hotline — Own a Used Auto Parts Hotline Network | Hotline HQ
seo.description: Own a used auto parts hotline for salvage yards and auto recyclers. Hotline HQ runs the lines, regional rooms, phones, recordings, and monitoring while you own the member revenue.
seo.keywords: auto parts hotline, used auto parts hotline, own an auto parts hotline, salvage yard hotline, auto recycler hotline, used auto parts network, hotline for salvage yards, parts locating hotline, own a hotline, start a hotline business

hero.heading: Own the used auto parts hotline for your market.
hero.lede: If you want to build an auto parts hotline for salvage yards and auto recyclers, this is the operating model. Hotline HQ replaces the phone tree with one always-on regional voice room where members broadcast a part request once and somebody who has it answers in seconds. You own the network and revenue. We run the system.

proof: Proven in production: our used auto parts hotline runs 500+ salvage yards across 12 regional rooms with a typical answer time of 2 seconds — monitored 24/7.

whyWins.heading: Why an auto parts hotline still wins.
whyWins.sub: Used auto parts yards need a live answer, not another stale database. When a counterperson can say the request once and reach a whole region instantly, more customer jobs stay alive and more member yards close sales they would have missed.

step1.title: You bring the community
step1.copy: You know your trade — the dealers, yards, or wholesalers who call each other all day looking for inventory. They're your members.

step2.title: We run the network
step2.copy: Hotline HQ runs the lines, the regional rooms, the recordings, the preconfigured phones, and the 24/7 monitoring. No telecom knowledge needed on your side.

step3.title: You own the revenue
step3.copy: Members pay a flat monthly fee for their line. It's your network and your brand — the membership revenue is yours, month after month.

trades.heading: Built first for used auto parts, adaptable to other trades.
trades.sub: The playbook starts with the used auto parts hotline already live today. If businesses in your industry already call each other asking "who has one?", the same network model can be adapted.
trades.usedAutoNote: Live today — 500+ salvage yards across 12 regional rooms
trades.heavyTruckNote: Same hunt, bigger inventory, fewer players per region
trades.equipmentNote: Attachments, parts, and whole units traded dealer to dealer
trades.buildingNote: Sourcing odd-lot and discontinued stock across a region
trades.wholesaleNote: Any trade where 'who has one?' is asked out loud every day

included.heading: What we run for you.
items: Regional voice rooms with always-on member lines
Preconfigured desk phones and a browser client for members
Every broadcast logged and recorded automatically
Auto-reconnect and 24/7 line monitoring with alerts
Answer-rate and activity reporting for you and your members
Member onboarding — a new line is live the day the phone arrives

faq.heading: Auto parts hotline FAQ.
faq.q1: What is an auto parts hotline?
faq.a1: An auto parts hotline is a live voice network where salvage yards and auto recyclers stay connected to the same regional room. A member broadcasts a part request once, and yards that have the part answer immediately.
faq.q2: Can I own the auto parts hotline while Hotline HQ runs the technology?
faq.a2: Yes. You own the member relationships, local brand, and recurring revenue. Hotline HQ runs the phones, browser lines, recordings, monitoring, and day-to-day network operations behind the scenes.
faq.q3: Is this built for used auto parts yards first?
faq.a3: Yes. The model is already proven with a live used auto parts hotline spanning 500+ salvage yards across 12 regional rooms, and that operating playbook can be launched in additional markets or adapted to similar dealer networks.

final.heading: Your market. Your auto parts hotline. Your revenue.
final.sub: Tell us about your region and member base. We'll walk you through what an auto parts hotline launch looks like and what the live network model earns.
